---
title: "Vol. 10 - 2026"
subtitle: "MusMat • Brazilian Journal of Music and Mathematics"
---

## Papers
### Non-Ptolemaic Nature of Musical Space
**Fabrizio Morlando**

[Abstract and paper](v10/01-Morlando.qmd)

### Generation of Chord Progressions using Guided Markov Chains
**Steven Berger**

[Abstract and paper](v10/02-Berger.qmd)

### Harmonic patterns in Brazilian choro: a data-driven comparison with Western classical and Anglophone popular music
**Mauro Orsini Windholz, David R. W. Sears, Fabian C. Moss**

[Abstract and paper](v10/03-Windholz.qmd)
